title: symphyotrichum cordifolium var. polycephalum
intro: Symphyotrichum cordifolium var. polycephalum, also known as the New York ironweed or heart-leaved ironweed, is a perennial plant species within the Asteraceae family. It possesses medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Symphyotrichum cordifolium var. polycephalum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for internal use, and its leaves and roots can be applied topically for skin conditions and injuries.
